title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 2260 Marcola Road Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8:30pm (541) 222-7327 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 222-7327 Vickie Martin [email protected] Screenwise (971) 673-0581 FAX (541) 685-1919 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon and 1:30pm-5pm, Tuesday 1:30pm-5pm and 5:30pm-8:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Buses 43, 41, 30, 36A Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. VOLUNTEERS IN MEDICINE CLINIC OF LANE COUNTY
